nodes.name: 伊比利亚半岛
nodes.summary: 伊比利亚半岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联18种鸟类，包括黑腹沙鸡、普通潜鸟、白琵鷺等18种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 农药污染
nodes.summary: 农业化学品通过水体和食物链影响鸟类生存。

nodes.name: 歐歌鶇
nodes.summary: 歐歌鶇（Song thrush，学名 Turdus philomelos），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于伊比利亚半岛、贝加尔湖，主要威胁包括农药污染。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 贝加尔湖
nodes.summary: 贝加尔湖是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联7种鸟类，包括赤麻鸭、白肩雕、Siberian nuthatch等7种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: right|thumb|Juvenile in New Zealand The song thrush breeds in most of Europe (although not in the greater part of Iberia, lowland Italy or southern Greece), and across Ukraine and Russia almost to Lake Baikal

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: right|thumb|Juvenile in New Zealand The song thrush breeds in most of Europe (although not in the greater part of Iberia, lowland Italy or southern Greece), and across Ukraine and Russia almost to Lake Baikal

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: thumb|left|In New Zealand The song thrush has an extensive range, estimated at , and a large population, with an estimated 40 to 71 million individuals in Europe alone. In the western Palaearctic, there is evidence of population decline, but at a level below the threshold required for global conservation concern (i.e., a reduction in numbers of more than 30% in ten years or three generations) and the IUCN Red List categorises this species as of "Least Concern". In Great Britain and the Netherlands, there has been a more than 50% decline in population, and the song thrush is included in regional Red Lists. The decreases are greatest in farmlands (73% since the mid-1970s) and believed to be due to changes in agricultural practices in recent decades. The precise reasons for the decline are not known but may be related to the loss of hedgerows, a move to sowing crops in autumn rather than spring, and possibly the increased use of pesticides
